mapper.select:
WITH pump AS ( SELECT tpi.pump_nm, tpi.sensor_count, SUM( IF(tadp.impeller_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.cavitation_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.DE_bpfo_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.DE_BPFI_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.DE_BSF_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.DE_FTF_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.NDE_BPFO_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.NDE_BPFI_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.NDE_BSF_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.NDE_FTF_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.DE_rms_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.NDE_rms_alarm = 1, 1, 0) ) AS total_alarm_sum FROM TB_AI_DIAG_PUMP tadp, TB_PUMP_INF tpi WHERE tadp.PUMP_ID = tpi.MOTOR_ID
AND tadp.ACQ_DATE >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 WEEK)
GROUP BY tpi.pump_nm ), motor AS ( SELECT tpi.pump_nm, tpi.sensor_count, SUM( IF(tadm.unbalance_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.misalignment_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.rotor_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.de_bpfo_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.DE_BPFI_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.DE_BSF_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.DE_FTF_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.NDE_BPFO_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.NDE_BPFI_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.NDE_BSF_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.NDE_FTF_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.DE_rms_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.NDE_rms_alarm = 1, 1, 0) ) AS total_alarm_sum2 FROM TB_AI_DIAG_MOTOR tadm, TB_PUMP_INF tpi WHERE tadm.motor_id = tpi.MOTOR_ID
AND tadm.ACQ_DATE >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 WEEK)
GROUP BY tpi.pump_nm ) SELECT p.pump_nm, p.sensor_count, p.total_alarm_sum + m.total_alarm_sum2 AS total_sum FROM pump p INNER JOIN motor m ON p.pump_nm = m.pump_nm ORDER BY p.pump_nm

SELECT allAlarm.pump_nm, DATE_FORMAT(allAlarm.ACQ_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as acq_date, allAlarm.alarm_type, tsi.sensor_type, tsi.sensor_name, tsi.sensor_decs FROM (SELECT tpi.pump_nm AS pump_nm, tadp.ACQ_DATE, CASE WHEN tadp.impeller_alarm = 1 THEN 'impeller' WHEN tadp.cavitation_alarm = 1 THEN 'cavitation' WHEN tadp.DE_bpfo_alarm = 1 THEN 'DE_bpfo' WHEN tadp.DE_BPFI_alarm = 1 THEN 'DE_BPFI' WHEN tadp.DE_BSF_alarm = 1 THEN 'DE_BSF' WHEN tadp.DE_FTF_alarm = 1 THEN 'DE_FTF' WHEN tadp.NDE_BPFO_alarm = 1 THEN 'NDE_BPFO' WHEN tadp.NDE_BPFI_alarm = 1 THEN 'NDE_BPFI' WHEN tadp.NDE_BSF_alarm = 1 THEN 'NDE_BSF' WHEN tadp.NDE_FTF_alarm = 1 THEN 'NDE_FTF' WHEN tadp.DE_rms_alarm = 1 THEN 'DE_rms' WHEN tadp.NDE_rms_alarm = 1 THEN 'NDE_rms' END AS alarm_type FROM TB_AI_DIAG_PUMP tadp INNER JOIN TB_PUMP_INF tpi ON tadp.PUMP_ID = tpi.MOTOR_ID WHERE tadp.impeller_alarm = 1 OR tadp.cavitation_alarm = 1 OR tadp.DE_bpfo_alarm = 1 OR tadp.DE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR tadp.DE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR tadp.DE_FTF_alarm = 1 OR tadp.NDE_BPFO_alarm = 1 OR tadp.NDE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR tadp.NDE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR tadp.NDE_FTF_alarm = 1 OR tadp.DE_rms_alarm = 1 OR tadp.NDE_rms_alarm = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT tpi.pump_nm AS pump_nm, tadm.ACQ_DATE, CASE WHEN tadm.unbalance_alarm = 1 THEN 'unbalance' WHEN tadm.misalignment_alarm = 1 THEN 'misalignment' WHEN tadm.rotor_alarm = 1 THEN 'rotor' WHEN tadm.de_bpfo_alarm = 1 THEN 'de_bpfo' WHEN tadm.DE_BPFI_alarm = 1 THEN 'DE_BPFI' WHEN tadm.DE_BSF_alarm = 1 THEN 'DE_BSF' WHEN tadm.DE_FTF_alarm = 1 THEN 'DE_FTF' WHEN tadm.NDE_BPFO_alarm = 1 THEN 'NDE_BPFO' WHEN tadm.NDE_BPFI_alarm = 1 THEN 'NDE_BPFI' WHEN tadm.NDE_BSF_alarm = 1 THEN 'NDE_BSF' WHEN tadm.NDE_FTF_alarm = 1 THEN 'NDE_FTF' WHEN tadm.DE_rms_alarm = 1 THEN 'DE_rms' WHEN tadm.NDE_rms_alarm = 1 THEN 'NDE_rms' END AS alarm_type FROM TB_AI_DIAG_MOTOR tadm INNER JOIN TB_PUMP_INF tpi ON tadm.motor_id = tpi.MOTOR_ID WHERE tadm.unbalance_alarm = 1 OR tadm.misalignment_alarm = 1 OR tadm.rotor_alarm = 1 OR tadm.de_bpfo_alarm = 1 OR tadm.DE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR tadm.DE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR tadm.DE_FTF_alarm = 1 OR tadm.NDE_BPFO_alarm = 1 OR tadm.NDE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR tadm.NDE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR tadm.NDE_FTF_alarm = 1 OR tadm.DE_rms_alarm = 1 OR tadm.NDE_rms_alarm = 1) allAlarm, TB_SENSOR_INF tsi WHERE allAlarm.alarm_type = sensor_name and allAlarm.ACQ_DATE >= #{startDate} and allAlarm.ACQ_DATE <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') ORDER BY allAlarm.ACQ_DATE desc
